nasb.text: He said, “You have asked a hard thing. Nevertheless, if you see me when I am taken from you, it shall be so for you; but if not, it shall not be so.”

esv.text: And he said, “You have asked a hard thing; yet, if you see me as I am being taken from you, it shall be so for you, but if you do not see me, it shall not be so.”

cnv.text: 以利亞說：“你所求的是一件難事，不過我被接離開你的時候，如果你看見我，就必得著，否則就得不著了。”

ccb.text: 以利亚说：“这是个很难的要求。不过，我被接走的时候，如果你看得见我，就可以得到，否则就得不到。”
